title: Eight University Teams To Vie For Laude Institute’s $10 Million AI Moonshots
description: Eight university research teams have been chosen as finalists for the Laude Institute’s $10 million Moonshots research competition on artificial intelligence solutions.
content:
Eight university teams have been announced as finalists for the Laude Institute’s Moonshots, a research competition that poses this big question: how can the world’s leading computer scientists use AI to solve humanity’s hardest problems.

title: China's meteoric rise in pharmaceuticals threatens US supremacy but what about patients?
description: China’s ambitions in semiconductors and artificial intelligence draw global attention, but its dramatic emergence as an innovator in healthcare is a story in itself. Its breakthroughs could reshape therapy across the world.

title: Want to Speak to the Manager? At a New San Francisco Store, That’s A.I.
description: Andon Market in San Francisco is billed as the first retail boutique run by an artificial intelligence agent. So far, the inventory seems random, and there are too many candles.
content:
Something feels off at Andon Market.

title: AI is helping these Terps create a biodegradable plastic cling wrap
description: Scientists at the University of Maryland are using artificial intelligence to create a biodegradable plastic wrap that reduces waste and extends the shelf life of food.
content:
